metadata.description: Local marketplace for SK_EFT_Hawking in-repo developer plugins. Marketplace catalog is tracked in-repo; plugins are enabled per-machine via .claude/settings.local.json enabledPlugins (untracked).

plugins.name: skeft-qa
plugins.description: QA review agents (Stage 13: adversarial-reviewer, claims-reviewer, figure-reviewer) plus the loop-durability dev-harness (SessionStart re-injection + PreToolUse(AskUserQuestion) guard + goal-mode skills).
